title: hieracium levicaule subsp. kuhmoniemiense
intro: Hieracium levicaule subsp. kuhmoniemiense is a subspecies of the Hieracium levicaule plant, a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate the immune system and act as an anti-inflammatory agent. The plant's health benefits include its potential to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Hieracium levicaule subsp. kuhmoniemiense is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infusions, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
